name: Bullet Guide Wick
description: Bullet Guide Wick is a fast-paced action shooter where every shot matters. Take control of a legendary hitman and bend bullets mid-air to eliminate enemies in stylish slow motion. Use precise timing, ricochet mechanics, and creative angles to outsmart waves of opponents across dynamic arenas. Upgrade your skills, unlock powerful weapons, and master increasingly challenging missions. With cinematic combat and intense gameplay, Bullet Guide Wick rewards strategy, accuracy, and quick reflexes in every explosive encounter.
instructions: A or D Left arrow key or right arrow key to guide the bullet
